overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban plaza and foggy streets during a heavy orange smog event. The camera follows a female character past neon-lit establishments including the 'Cirrus' bar, through pedestrian areas with heavy atmospheric haze and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza in front of Cirrus bar

events.description: camera approaches glass storefront and observes bartender working inside through the window

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the outdoor plaza, observing the Cirrus bar exterior and looking through windows

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table on the left side of the plaza

entered.detail: large blue and red neon sign reading 'CIRRUS' on building facade
purple and black chairs with round tables arranged on the plaza
rectangular white concrete planters with green plants
large glass windows revealing bar interior with neon lighting and bartender
tall palm trees visible through the orange haze in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night in a futuristic city plaza outside the Cirrus bar. Purple outdoor furniture sits on the concrete walkway while neon signage glows through the orange smog. The camera moves slowly past the establishment, briefly observing a bartender through the large glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza under elevated structure

events.description: camera transitions from free exploration to following a female pedestrian with white pants and red jacket
moving from the semi-covered plaza into a wider walkway with concrete stairs visible on the left

agents.ego_description: following a female character with a high ponytail, red patterned jacket, and white pants through the plaza

notable_agents.action: female character with white pants walking ahead through the plaza toward the foggy street
person sitting on a bench near the orange railings

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with green metal railings leading upward to an upper level
large vertical digital billboard displaying colorful graphics and text
orange and green metal railings along the walkway edge
white and orange striped concrete barriers blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: The camera begins following a female character through a covered pedestrian plaza beneath an elevated structure. Concrete stairs rise on the left while digital billboards glow on the right. The orange smog thickens as they move deeper into the plaza, passing other pedestrians and concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban street with vehicle traffic

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as the camera enters an area with heavier orange smog and fog
futuristic vehicles with headlights on become visible driving slowly through the fog on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the heavy fog, passing other pedestrians and approaching the street with vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on driving slowly through the foggy street

entered.detail: tall curved street lamp with blue neon light emission
futuristic cars with glowing headlights moving through the dense fog
tall brutalist concrete building wall with vertical architectural lines

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow foggy street where visibility is severely limited by thick orange smog. Futuristic street lamps cast blue light through the haze while vehicles with bright headlights crawl along the adjacent road. The concrete building facade looms on the left as pedestrians emerge from and disappear into the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that gradually descends into a claustrophobic, smog-choked street. It begins outside the Cirrus bar, gliding past purple outdoor furniture and glowing signage while catching a glimpse of a bartender through large glass windows. As the camera shifts to follow a female character, the environment transitions into a covered pedestrian plaza beneath an elevated structure, where digital billboards illuminate the path and the orange smog begins to thicken. The scene then narrows into a foggy street where visibility drops severely, with blue street lamps and bright vehicle headlights piercing through the dense haze. Finally, the camera moves alongside a looming concrete facade as pedestrians emerge and vanish into the heavy atmospheric fog.
